pr.title: docs(c2): Session 22 travel prep package
pr.body:
## Summary

- Adds **Session 22 planning package**: hub (`session_22/README.md`), planning anchor, prep brief, **travel-to-Mireward runbook** (weather spine, point-crawl, player-roll table registry §6), open GM knobs.
- Adds **Mireward place-build scaffold**, Edge of the World stub, Mirathorn away stub, journey tracker weather rows.
- Adds **HANDOFF** for authoring four roll tables (T-NPC d12, T-DIL d12, T-DIL-G d6, T-CF d8) plus session index HANDOFF.
- Adds **Session 21 canon foundation**: recap, normalized/breadcrumbed/session-memory artifacts, Boots of Crowing Wings sync, Bonogo loot log.
- Adds **c2 live-prep smoke** artifacts (2026-05-23) and `Event Table Design Guidance.md` / travel session design refs.

## Not in this PR

Unrelated WIP left on branch base: c1s4 context classification, pr58 artifact edits, C1S13 deepdive, HANDOFF-pr24.

## Test plan

- [ ] Review `session_22_travel_to_mireward_runbook.md` at-table read order
- [ ] Confirm Session 21 recap is table canon input for S22
- [ ] Dispatch `Docs/Plans/HANDOFF-s22-travel-roll-tables.md` to author missing d12/d8/d6 tables
- [ ] No code regressions expected (docs + corpus + eval artifacts only)


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: Drakosfire
